extract: Delphox (Japanese: マフォクシー Mahoxy) is a dual-type Fire/Psychic Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Braixen starting at level 36. It is the final form of Fennekin. Delphox can Mega Evolve into Mega Delphox using the Delphoxite. Mega Delphox was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
